project.name: test-data-aviation
project.description: Aviation data opensource dashboard - visualize 85K+ airports, routes, runways trên bản đồ tương tác

database.note: Portable, no server needed for small team

database_schema.summary: 8 bảng lưu dữ liệu aviation: sân bay, đường băng, tần số, navaids, quốc gia, vùng, hãng bay, tuyến bay

tables.name: airport_frequencies
tables.purpose: Tần số liên lạc sân bay

database_schema.relationships: airports → runways (1:N), airports → frequencies (1:N), countries → airports (1:N), airlines → routes (1:N)

api_endpoints.purpose: Kiểm tra server sống, trả về {status, version}
Danh sách sân bay (phân trang, lọc country/type/continent/scheduled)
Chi tiết 1 sân bay + runways + frequencies
Tìm kiếm theo ICAO/IATA/tên/thành phố (requires q param)
Markers cho bản đồ (theo bounding box: north/south/east/west)
Tuyến bay inbound/outbound từ 1 sân bay (by ICAO or IATA)
Database size, total records, per-table breakdown

frontend_pages.name: Dashboard
frontend_pages.features: KPI cards, bar chart (countries), pie chart (types), quick links

frontend_pages.name: World Map
frontend_pages.features: 85K airports, Leaflet dark tiles, type filters, cluster markers

frontend_pages.name: Airport Detail
frontend_pages.features: Info cards, runways table, frequencies table, View Routes button

frontend_pages.name: Statistics
frontend_pages.features: Top 20 countries bar chart, type distribution pie chart

frontend_pages.name: Data Monitor
frontend_pages.features: API health, DB size, record counts per source, attribution

features: Interactive world map (85K+ airports, clustering, dark tiles)
Dashboard KPIs & statistics with animated counters
Search & filter airports (ICAO, IATA, name, type, country)
Data monitor (API health, DB size, source attribution)
Loading skeletons (shimmer animation for KPI, charts, tables)

components.name: Sidebar
components.purpose: Navigation sidebar with active state highlighting

components.name: KPICard
components.purpose: Reusable stat card with icon, value, label

components.name: AirportMap
components.purpose: Leaflet map with dark tiles, markers, clustering

components.name: ErrorBoundary
components.purpose: React error boundary with themed fallback

hooks.name: useStats
hooks.purpose: SWR hooks for stats, countries, types, freshness, health

hooks.name: useAirports
hooks.purpose: SWR hook for airport detail with caching

decisions.reason: Open-source, free, phù hợp aviation opensource
Modern, phù hợp aviation aesthetic, glassmorphism cards
Free dark tile layer, fits dark theme

decisions.decision: SWR for caching thay vì React Query
decisions.reason: Lighter, simpler API cho read-heavy dashboard

decisions.decision: Starlette TestClient thay vì live server tests
decisions.reason: No need for running server, faster, no terminal conflicts

patterns: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy (sync mode) cho API read-heavy với SQLite
SWR hooks pattern: wrap fetcher functions, 5-min dedupingInterval
Starlette TestClient for sync testing of async FastAPI endpoints
Leaflet clustering + bounding box queries for large marker datasets
gotchas: httpx ASGITransport does NOT support sync Client context manager — use Starlette TestClient instead
FastAPI search endpoint: q param required (min_length=2) — tests must always provide q
pip on Windows Python 3.13 can get corrupted — use python -m ensurepip --upgrade to fix
Next.js dynamic routes with spaces in path — use encodeURIComponent for ICAO codes
conventions: Response format: {data: [...], pagination: {total, limit, offset, has_more}}
Map endpoint uses north/south/east/west params (not sw/ne)
Routes endpoint returns {outbound: [...], inbound: [...], total_outbound, total_inbound}
